175 meters from Malmö Central Station is where our ne centre Epic will open in 2019.
Conveniently located with proximity to major bus, train and airport links.
The centre is only a short walk away from the pulse of Lilla Torg with its variety of restaurants.
Close by is Malmö Live with culture, entertainment , shopping and night life on your door step.

You might want to think about the following user interface problem.
At any forum page, what does "Edit Page" at the top bar mean?
Too many times I have accidentally clicked on "Edit Page" when I intended to make a post in the forum.
True, I've done this too.
Ideally the "edit page" link should be absent from forum pages, in my opinion.

Mat and Brittany are both from the east coast, but ended up meeting after they had both moved to Colorado!
They met online and corresponded for a while via email, then phone, and eventually met in person.
By the time they met and went on a first date, they felt like they had already known each other forever.

Saint-Martin Belgian Dubbel - Four Fathers Brewing Co.
Rich malt, raisins, sweetness, dark stone fruits, plums.
sweet, light bodied, slight warming from the alcohol content.
A traditional Belgian style Abbey Dubbel.
First brewed by trappist monks in Belgium this is a fairly traditional example of the style.
Uses Belgian Candi Syrup (beet sugar syrup) to lighten body, and boost alcohol and flavour.
Pilsner, Munich I, Flaked Wheat, Special W, Abbey malt.
Perle for Bittering, Belgian Candi Syrup.
